title: Like Clockwork
body:
Backports the 1.21 music to 1.20.2-6.

Background music plays the same as 1.21. See [the wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_1.21#Music). The `+menu` version plays the songs on the main menu as well as in game.

Discs have a 50% of playing instead of the disc listed below.

This is reflected in the music disc's description.

The discs were selected by length (required due to [this bug](https://modrinth.com/mod/jukebox-custom-disc-fix)), then by matching redstone power signal (sourced from the wiki [here](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Music_Disc))

Creator - Wait

Creator Music Box Ver. - 11

Precipice - Blocks
